result:
**Goal: Add RLE pattern import/export to unlock the entire Game of Life pattern ecosystem.**

RLE (Run Length Encoded) is the standard format used by the Game of Life community — LifeWiki, Golly, and every major pattern collection use it. Right now the project only supports the simple `.cells` plaintext format, which limits it to small patterns. Adding RLE support would let users load thousands of complex patterns (spaceships, oscillators, guns, breeders) from online libraries, and export their creations in a format others can use. This is the single highest-leverage feature for connecting the simulator to the broader cellular automaton world.
